rationale: Educ. Code §21.155 governs continuing contracts for administrative personnel reclassified as teachers. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The district may grant to a person who has served as principal or in another administrative position for which certification is required, at the completion of the person's service in that capacity, a continuing contract to serve as a teacher
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no fiscal, operational, or statutory linkage identified.
